## Business Identity

Studio location: Lagos, Nigeria
Service area: Nationwide across Nigeria

## About

Decor Adorne is Nigeria's specialist studio for Arabian-inspired luxury event decoration. The studio is built around the Arabian aesthetic, brass Moroccan lanterns, sheer ceiling drapery, jewel-toned florals, and majlis-style low seating, translated for Nigerian celebrations. Many of the traditions Decor Adorne styles (Henna nights, Kamu ceremonies, Nikkahs, Durbars) are themselves Arabian-influenced, rooted in Hausa-Fulani and Muslim Nigerian culture.

Founded in 2016 and based in Lagos, Decor Adorne has styled over 500 events. While the studio is anchored in Lagos, it serves clients nationwide, Abuja, Kano, Kaduna, Sokoto, Ibadan, Port Harcourt, and beyond, travelling with its lanterns, fabrics, and team.

## Signature Aesthetic

Brass and copper Moroccan lanterns. Sheer ceiling-to-floor drapery. Majlis-style low cushion seating in velvet and brocade. Jewel-toned florals (pomegranate, marigold, deep rose). Candlelight as primary mood lighting. Arabic-script and calligraphy accents. Aso-oke and brocade textile installations for cultural ceremonies.

## Services

1. Arabian Night Decoration (signature), arabian-night-decoration-lagos
2. Henna Party Decoration (signature), henna-party-decor-lagos
3. Kamu Decoration, kamu-decoration-lagos

5. Durbar Decoration, durbar-decoration-lagos
6. Engagement Decoration, engagement-decor-lagos
7. Naming Ceremony Decoration, naming-ceremony-decor-lagos
8. Luxury Picnic Setup, picnic-setup-lagos
9. Birthday Decoration, birthday-decoration-lagos
10. Event Rentals, event-rentals-lagos

## Service Areas

Nationwide across Nigeria. Studio and core operations in Lagos (Victoria Island, Lekki, Ikoyi, Ikeja, Mainland). Regular service in Abuja, Kano, Kaduna, Sokoto, Ibadan, and Port Harcourt. Travel anywhere in Nigeria for the right brief.

## Statistics

- 500+ events styled
- 8 years in business (since 2016)
- 200+ five-star client reviews
- Average rating: 4.9 / 5.0

## Key Differentiators

Arabian-inspired specialism. Cultural fluency (Hausa-Fulani, Muslim, and pan-Nigerian traditions). Editorial design quality. Nationwide reach from a Lagos base. 2-hour reply guarantee. Full-service: consultation, setup, and breakdown.
